long_description: The chricuit between bbr01.sr01.che01 and the Bharti transit session are down. We are reaching out to Bharti for further investigation.
short_description: The chricuit between bbr01.sr01.che01 and the Bharti transit session are down.
close_notes: The chricuit between bbr01.sr01.che01 and the Bharti transit session are down causing traffic to shift to redundant links.
